rationale.root_cause: No diagnosis was provided; it did not identify the unsafe strcpy at line 11 or explain attacker-controlled argv overflow/global_buffer_overflow.
rationale.local_fix: No code change was suggested to replace the unbounded copy with a length-checked, null-terminating copy.
rationale.global_fix: No root-cause remediation was proposed, such as adopting a bounded string API or centralizing argv validation.
